home.tagline: Smart outfit suggestions from your wardrobe, perfect for any occasion.
home.freeNote: Free · No spam · For Gen Z
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to outfit yourself
home.featuresSubtitle: From wardrobe management to virtual try-on and outfit suggestions — all in one app.
home.waitlistSubtitle: Leave your email to get notified when Fitcheck launches new features.

features.wardrobeDesc: Capture and store all your clothes in one place, clean and always in your pocket.
features.tryonDesc: Try on any outfit on your body using AI — no need to try on clothes in real life.
features.suggestDesc: AI outfit suggestions based on weather, occasion and your style in seconds.

auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to start styling smarter

auth.resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

validation.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.changePasswordDesc: Set a new password for your account.
settings.signOutEverywhereDesc: End your session everywhere you're logged in.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download your account info and wardrobe as a JSON file.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account, wardrobe and images. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes everything. Type DELETE to confirm.
settings.deleteError: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.
settings.styleProfileDesc: Used to personalize your outfit suggestions.
settings.profileSaveError: Couldn't save. Did you run the profiles SQL?

onboarding.title: Set up your style profile
onboarding.subtitle: Help our AI suggest outfits that fit you. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.saveError: Couldn't save. Did you run the profiles SQL? Please try again.
onboarding.stepBodyDesc: Adjust the sliders so suggestions fit you better.
onboarding.stepStylesDesc: Pick the styles you like — choose as many as you want.
onboarding.stepColorsDesc: Which color tones do you gravitate to?
onboarding.stepOccasionsDesc: Pick the occasions you dress for most.

detect.title: Scan your clothes
detect.subtitle: Snap or upload a photo — AI will detect the items.
detect.cameraError: Couldn't access the camera. Check permissions or use upload instead.
detect.detectError: Detection failed. Is GEMINI_API_KEY set on the server? Please try again.
detect.noItems: No clothing items found. Try another photo.
detect.found: Found {count} item(s) — pick which to add.
detect.name: Name
detect.addError: Couldn't add items. Please try again.
detect.dropHint: Or drag, drop or paste an image here

outfit.title: Outfit ideas
outfit.subtitle: Let AI style complete looks from the clothes you own.
outfit.notePlaceholder: e.g. it's chilly, I want something cozy
outfit.error: Couldn't get suggestions. Is GEMINI_API_KEY set on the server? Please try again.
outfit.noResults: Couldn't build an outfit from your current wardrobe. Try adding a few more pieces.
outfit.needItems: Add at least 2 items to your wardrobe to get outfit suggestions.

profilePage.title: My measurements
profilePage.subtitle: Used to personalize your outfit suggestions.

stylist.title: AI Stylist
stylist.subtitle: Chat for personalized outfit ideas.
stylist.greeting: Hi! I'm Fitcheck's AI stylist 💜 Where are you headed, or what do you feel like wearing? I'll suggest outfits from your wardrobe!
stylist.placeholder: Tell me what you want to wear...
stylist.error: I couldn't reply right now. Please try again!

homePage.heroTag: Your smart wardrobe & AI styling — dress with confidence every day.
homePage.aboutBody: Fitcheck is a digital wardrobe app for Gen Z: digitize all your clothes, let AI cut them out on white, get outfit ideas by occasion and style, and chat with a virtual stylist — all in one tidy place, with a Vietnamese soul.
homePage.fWardrobe: Digitize & manage all your clothes with clean white-background photos.
homePage.fDetect: Snap, upload or paste a photo — AI detects and cuts out each item on white.
homePage.fOutfit: Outfit ideas from your wardrobe by occasion & style; save favorite looks.
homePage.fStylist: Chat with an AI stylist, advised by your wardrobe and measurements.
homePage.fProfile: Save measurements, skin tone and body shape for sharper suggestions.
homePage.p1d: A smart wardrobe helping young people dress confidently every day.
homePage.p2d: Studying Vietnamese garment heritage — áo dài, brocade, Huế purple — to ground a Vietnamese spirit.
homePage.p3d: A logo blending a shirt & a check, a purple palette, the Be Vietnam Pro typeface.
homePage.p4d: Background cutout via computer vision (Gemini), outfit suggestions and a stylist chat.
homePage.p5d: A responsive web UI, Vietnamese–English, light/dark mode.
homePage.teamBio: Single-handedly ideated, researched, branded and built all of Fitcheck.
homePage.d1d: Tap Add → snap/upload/paste → AI cuts out → pick items → save to wardrobe.
homePage.d2d: Open Outfits → pick an occasion → AI suggests → tap ♥ to save a look.
homePage.d3d: Tell it where you're going or what you want to wear — it styles from your wardrobe.
homePage.brandDesc: See Fitcheck's logo, palette, type and patterns.
homePage.fTryon: Try clothes on your photo or a model with AI.

tryon.title: Virtual try-on
tryon.subtitle: Try a wardrobe item on your photo or a model.
tryon.noItems: Your wardrobe is empty — add a few items first.
tryon.uploadHint: Upload a clear, front-facing, full-body photo.
tryon.defaultNote: Sample model photos — replace them in lib/tryon.ts.
tryon.error: Try-on failed. Is FASHN_API_KEY set on the server? Please try again.
